message:
Implement Phase 2 Encryption Engine for pages export

- Add Argon2id key derivation with configurable parameters
- Implement AES-256-GCM streaming encryption with chunked AEAD
- Add envelope encryption with multiple key slots (password + recovery)
- Generate config.json output format with encryption metadata
- Add HKDF-SHA256 for recovery secret key derivation
- Use counter-based nonce derivation to prevent reuse
- Add zeroize, flate2, rand dependencies for secure memory clearing
- Include 8 comprehensive unit tests covering all acceptance criteria
- Add 7 export filter tests for Phase 1 completion

Tested: All encryption tests pass, clippy clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -72,6 +72,9 @@ dialoguer = "*"
 ssh2 = "*"
 argon2 = "*"
 hkdf = "*"
+zeroize = { version = "*", features = ["derive"] }
+flate2 = "*"

 # macOS keychain access (optional, for ChatGPT decryption)
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "macos")'.dependencies]
